summary: Iteration 25 - Frontend PracticeDetailPage Refactor Testing Complete. All 16 features tested successfully. Verified: (1) Login with admin@aic.it / Admin123! works. (2) Draft practice 98cf9182 shows understanding gate with workspace data (entity, required docs, Herion/Tu labels). (3) 6-step progress bar with Comprendi highlighted for draft. (4) 'Inizia la pratica' CTA button present and functional. (5) Click 'Inizia la pratica' transitions to waiting_user_documents. (6) Escalated practice d9c4fca6 shows blocker cards with severity labels (Escalation attiva - high, Documenti mancanti - medium). (7) Guidance card shows 'RICHIEDE LA TUA AZIONE' label. (8) Official Step Card shows entity name, action label, channel, who acts, credentials, portal link, proof status, security note. (9) Delegation section shows current state with level label (Assistenza). (10) Grant delegation dialog shows 3 levels (assist/partial/full) with Italian descriptions. (11) Revoke delegation button works. (12) Current Agent card shows agent name, title, status. (13) Chat section present with suggestion buttons. (14) Timeline shows color-coded events. (15) Documents section shows missing docs with 'Da caricare' labels. (16) All UI text in Italian.
critical_code_review_comments: PracticeDetailPage correctly uses workspace endpoint as source of truth for all UI state
UnderstandingGate component correctly displays entity name, required docs, and Herion/Tu labels from workspace.official_action and workspace.documents_summary
OfficialStepCard correctly shows all required fields: entity_name, action_label, submission_channel, who acts (Tu/Herion/Delegated), credentials_required, portal_url, proof status, security note
DelegationSection correctly shows active/inactive state with level labels (Assistenza/Parziale/Completa) and scope_labels
Grant delegation dialog correctly shows 3 levels with Italian descriptions
Blocker cards correctly display severity-based styling (red for high, amber for medium)
Current agent card correctly shows agent name, title, and status from workspace.current_agent
Timeline correctly displays color-coded events from workspace.timeline_summary
All UI text is in Italian as required
seed_data_creation: Used existing practices: 98cf9182-e7df-4b73-a2e4-1c69775e7caa (draft vat_registration), d9c4fca6-a27d-4f97-a006-d191505549f9 (escalated with delegation active). Reset 98cf9182 back to draft status after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 tested the frontend PracticeDetailPage refactor. All features working correctly: (1) Workspace endpoint integration - page loads data from GET /api/practices/{id}/workspace. (2) UnderstandingGate shows for draft practices with entity, docs, Herion/Tu labels. (3) OfficialStepCard shows entity, channel, who acts, credentials, portal link, proof status, security note. (4) DelegationSection shows active/inactive state with level labels and scope_labels. (5) Grant delegation dialog has 3 levels (assist/partial/full). (6) Revoke delegation works. (7) Blocker cards show severity-based styling. (8) Current agent card shows agent info. (9) Timeline shows color-coded events. (10) Documents section shows missing docs with 'Da caricare' labels. Test practices: 98cf9182 (draft), d9c4fca6 (escalated with delegation).
